text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 239 

SEX_CD 

LABEL: Sex (Biological) — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: The beneficiary’s biological sex; most recent in the calendar and the two prior years. 

SHORT NAME: SEX_CD 

LONG NAME: SEX_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: M = Male 
F = Female 
Null/missing = source value is
